jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at AgroStar
jsonLd.description:
AgroStar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AgroStar:
AgroStar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar!
